caption: The video captures a group of soccer players during a training session on a well-maintained field. The players, dressed in blue jerseys with green shorts and socks, are engaged in a warm-up exercise. They are standing in a circle, passing a ball around while performing synchronized movements such as jumping and stretching. Coaches in black attire are present, observing and guiding the players. The background features an empty stadium with red and white seats, adorned with various advertisements. The atmosphere is focused and energetic, indicating a professional and disciplined training environment.
